hawkish_phrases: risks to the growth outlook remained tilted to the downside
protracted period of very low inflation thus remained a matter of continued concern
crucial to avoid second-round effects on wage and price setting
inflationary pressures continued to be weak
most measures of underlying inflation had yet to show clear signs of an upward trend
dovish_phrases: additional stimulus, beyond the impetus already taken into account, was expected from the monetary policy measures still to be implemented
act by using all the instruments available within its mandate, if warranted
time was needed for the effects of all the measures to fully unfold
continued focus on implementing the measures adopted
summary: The Governing Council held all policy rates unchanged (main refinancing at 0.00%, deposit at -0.40%) with unanimous agreement, maintaining an accommodative stance focused on implementing the March 2016 package while acknowledging improved risk balance but persistent inflation weakness and expressing readiness to act if warranted.
